original: You feel thoroughly refreshed, energized by the delicious alien nectar.
You feel a bit refreshed, though nothing else happens.

You flip up the top of the thermos and bring the container up to your mouth. The substance inside is almost painfully sweet, burning your nose until your [pc.lips] wrap around the tip and you start sucking the contents down. When you’ve finished the thermos off, you suck in a sharp breath as the sweet nectar drools down your throat like syrup.
You feel thoroughly refreshed, energized by the delicious alien nectar.
You feel a bit refreshed, though nothing else happens.
({var0}()?{var2}.capitalize({var1}):{var3}+{var4})+" opens a thermos of nectar and drinks it
context: <<POS:06565189>> <<VARS:var0=inCombat,var1=e.getCombatName(),!1,var2=h.m,var3=e.capitalA,var4=e.short>> output((inCombat()?h.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1):e.capitalA+e.short)+" opens a thermos of nectar and drinks it")
